calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jan-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Continued To Jan-25-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Winslow for Stephen Osborne (Petitioner).

Mr. Winslow presented a consent to the order on the Petition for Instructions subject to stipulation. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order and consent).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Aug-16-2011 Continued To Aug-30-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Edward Winlsow for and with Stephen Osborne (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Winslow stated that he spoke with Mr. McKay, that they agreed to a continuance and that they are going to attempt resolution. The Petition for Instructions was continued to August 30, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court stated that if the matter is not resolved, that Eric Osborne will need to file written objection by that date or the matter will be continued further out.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jul-05-2011 Continued To Aug-16-11 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
